overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a torch-bearing character through a medieval village at night. The group walks along narrow cobblestone streets, passes through a stone gate, and continues through the settlement with other NPCs carrying torches and lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with high stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow cobblestone street holding a torch aloft

notable_agents.action: torch-bearing villager walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: high medieval stone wall with crenellations running along the right side of the street
stone building with small windows on the left side of the narrow street
uneven cobblestone road surface illuminated by torchlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow medieval street at night, flanked by a tall stone wall on the right and stone buildings on the left. The ego character walks forward holding a torch, following distant torch-bearing figures down the cobblestone path.

events.description: entering the covered stone archway gate, transitioning from open street to enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway gate while holding torch, following other torchbearers

notable_agents.action: villager with torch walking just ahead through the gate

entered.detail: large medieval stone archway with wooden doors forming a gate through the wall

segments.scene_description: The group approaches and enters a substantial stone archway gate set into the defensive wall. The space becomes enclosed and darker as they pass through the tunnel-like gate structure, with the stone walls now closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with half-timbered houses

events.description: exiting the stone gate into the open village center with scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the open village square alongside multiple torch-bearing companions

notable_agents.action: villager walking alongside with torch raised

entered.detail: traditional medieval half-timbered house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
open dirt area in the village center surrounded by scattered buildings
wooden cart or wagon parked near the buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate, the scene opens into a village square with half-timbered houses visible under the night sky. The group of torchbearers spreads out slightly as they walk across the open dirt ground, passing wooden structures and carts.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden palisade fences

agents.ego_description: walking toward a wooden gate structure with companions, one carrying a lantern

notable_agents.action: companion carrying a rectangular lantern alongside the torchbearers

entered.detail: tall wooden fence made of vertical logs running along the right side of the path
large wooden gate with crossbeam structure at the edge of the village

segments.scene_description: The group proceeds through the village outskirts toward a wooden gate, with a palisade fence now running along the right side. A companion with a lantern walks alongside the torchbearers as they approach the wooden gate structure under the cloudy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow medieval corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling village settlement at night. It begins on a tight cobblestone street flanked by a tall stone wall and buildings, following a group of torchbearers moving forward into the darkness. As the group advances, the space becomes more enclosed and shadowed while passing through a substantial stone archway gate. The scene then expands upon emerging from the tunnel into a village square filled with half-timbered houses and wooden carts scattered across the open dirt ground. Finally, the camera follows the group toward the village outskirts, passing a palisade fence and a companion with a lantern before approaching a wooden gate under a cloudy night sky.
